title: Torsk
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Torsk''' was a creature native to [[Alzoc III/Legends|Alzoc III]]. [[Teroenza]] had a statue of a torsk made of [[Lapis/Legends|lapis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{C|statue only}}
